name: Astro (ASO)
description: Astro — native macOS ASO app for iOS developers with unlimited keyword tracking, Apple Search Ads popularity data, difficulty scoring, and competitor keyword discovery at $9/month.

seo.title: Astro (ASO) — App Growth Tooling (ASO)
seo.meta_description: Astro (ASO): Astro — native macOS ASO app for iOS developers with unlimited keyword tracking, Apple Search Ads popularity data, difficulty scoring, and competit

when_to_use: Unlimited keyword tracking for iOS apps from a $9/month macOS app
Discovering competitor keywords using Apple Search Ads popularity data
Tracking keyword difficulty scores to prioritize metadata changes
Daily rank monitoring without cloud subscription cost for indie devs

pros: Unlimited keyword tracking at that price
Uses Apple Search Ads popularity data
Difficulty scoring and competitor keyword discovery
cons: Small team means slower feature cadence
review.verdict: Excellent value native ASO app for solo iOS devs on Mac, not for teams or cross-platform shops.
review.best_for: Solo iOS devs on macOS who want unlimited tracking cheaply
